blended.narrative: 49 Degrees North is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.0 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,437 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.8" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 25".
